_publications._publicationTitle: Cell of origin and microenvironment contribution for NF1-associated dermal neurofibromas.

_contextSnippet: We observed that both the gross skin and also isolated SKPs were positive for X-gal staining, indicating that the topical tamoxifen was able to penetrate the skin and induce recombination
details: Topical tamoxifen application twice daily for 5 consecutive days successfully induced recombination in SKPs in vivo
